metadata.creator: System Of a Down
metadata.description: Mezmerize is the fourth studio album by American heavy metal band System of a Down, released on May 17, 2005, by American Recordings and Columbia Records. Upon its release, the album received acclaim from critics. The album sold over 450,000 copies in its first week (over 200,000 more than Toxicity did), and immediately topped the Billboard 200.
metadata.subject: System Of a Down
Mezmerize
Nu metal
metadata.title: System Of a Down - Mezmerize.flac (full album)
